title: lib/output
description: The lib/output directory is responsible for handling the output data of the Hadoop MapReduce job. It provides a way to write the output data to different files based on a given key. The MultipleOutputs class is a wrapper for writing to multiple output files in a Hadoop MapReduce job. It uses a Map to store the RecordWriter objects for each output file and provides methods to write key-value pairs to the appropriate RecordWriter based on the key. The class also provides methods to get the RecordWriter for a specific output file and to close all the opened outputs. The MultipleOutputs class depends on the OutputCommitter, TaskAttemptContext, RecordWriter, and Configuration classes.
